untranslatable_reason: This is a stop loss optimization rule, not a position sizing rule. It describes when to adjust stop loss distance based on statistical trade outcome metrics (standard deviation vs. average win), which is a risk management parameter adjustment, not a position sizing method. Position sizing determines how many contracts/shares to trade; this rule determines where to place stops. The sizing methods provided (R_MULTIPLE, OPTIMAL_F, FIXED_FRACTIONAL, etc.) all control trade size/capital allocation, not stop placement.
